summary: All 3 critical fixes verified successfully: (1) Nav typography WHITE on dark purple gradient - PASSED, (2) Bento Grid with 3 screenshots - PASSED, (3) Login flow and dashboard - PASSED. No issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: Nav typography fix working correctly - white text on transparent gradient, dark text on scrolled white bg
Bento Grid layout correct - dashboard has lg:col-span-2 lg:row-span-2, quotes and portal each 1/3 width
All 3 WebP screenshots load successfully (dashboard-overview.webp, quote-builder.webp, client-portal.webp)
Login flow works - POST /api/auth/login returns token and sets HTTP-only cookie
Dashboard loads with data after login - no 'Authentication required' error
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 critical fixes verified. Nav uses scrolled state to toggle between white text (transparent bg) and dark text (white bg). Bento grid in FeaturesSection shows 3 screenshots with proper grid layout. Auth uses HTTP-only cookies with credentials:'include'.

Nav_Typography_Scrolled.details: KOLOR text: rgb(109,40,217) purple, Login link: rgb(75,85,99) gray, CTA button: purple bg with white text

Nav_Background_Transition.details: Not scrolled: rgba(0,0,0,0) transparent, Scrolled: rgba(255,255,255,0.8) white with backdrop blur

Dashboard_Screenshot.details: src=/screenshots/dashboard-overview.webp, loaded=true, naturalWidth=1600, has lg:col-span-2 lg:row-span-2

Feature_Cards_Count.details: 6 feature cards visible below bento grid

Backend_Auth_Login.details: POST /api/auth/login with bookingtest@test.com / password123 returns token and user data

Backend_Auth_Me.details: GET /api/auth/me with cookie returns user data

Login_Page_Renders.details: Login form with email, password, remember me checkbox, submit button

Dashboard_Loads_With_Data.details: Dashboard shows 'Welcome to KOLOR STUDIO, Sarah!', onboarding checklist, Active Commissions with leads

No_Auth_Required_Error.details: Dashboard does not show 'Authentication required' error after login

Console_Errors.details: No unexpected console errors on landing page. 401 errors before login are expected behavior.
